expected_api.register: public static bool RegisterDialogueCommand(string ownerId, string commandId, string targetTemplateGuid, string label, Func<bool> canExecute, Action execute)

cases.expected: type, assembly source identity, API version and both method signatures match exactly
assembly name/version/API constant/signatures and SHA-256 match approved profile evidence

cases.setup: same owner and command registered twice with same and different delegates
cases.expected: documented deterministic result; no duplicate callback or silent replacement unless explicitly contracted

cases.setup: two mods register different commands and shared command IDs under different owners
cases.expected: one owner cannot remove or replace another owner's commands

cases.setup: external unregister throws or returns false
cases.expected: bridge retains cleanup state and retries; stale callbacks are not left reachable
cases.current_source_observation: bridge clears local state in finally

cases.setup: gate closes between canExecute, command selection and execute delegate
cases.expected: execute rechecks gate and performs no mount mutation when closed

cases.setup: AvalonCompanions loads late, reloads, or disappears after MethodInfo capture
cases.expected: bounded discovery, stale-handle invalidation, owner cleanup and re-registration without duplicates

decision.reason: source API v1 and version 0.2.17 are exact, but runtime assembly identity, behavior, owner isolation and cleanup are unverified
